caption: A man with brown hair, wearing a light-colored button-down shirt and a dark blazer, is seated and speaking in an indoor interview setting. He is positioned in front of a white backdrop featuring repeated blue cube logos and the text "BigDataSV 2015" and "theCUBE". A blue banner at the bottom of the screen displays the text "#theCUBE LIVE at #BigDataSV 2015" along with "Fairmont Runet - Valley Room San Jose, CA". To his right, a clear plastic water bottle sits on a surface. As the sequence progresses, the man shifts his facial expression and head position slightly while speaking, moving from a more open-mouthed expression to a slight smile with closed lips. The background elements, including the logos and the information banner, remain static throughout the clip.
